sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84501" key="polisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πολίζω</etym>) <sense id="n84501.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">founder of a city,</tr_> rejected by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
